headline: Competitive Positioning Analysis Complete: ReportEase owns affordable power for agencies at 1/10th Supermetrics cost

primary_stat.label: Competitive Advantage
primary_stat.value: 92% cheaper than Supermetrics, 8x faster setup, built for agencies

highlights: Analyzed 5 major competitors: Supermetrics, Whatagraph, Looker, Google Data Studio, native platform reporting
Mapped 30+ customer pain points across G2, Capterra, Trustpilot reviews and industry forums
Created comprehensive feature matrix comparing 40+ dimensions across all competitors
Identified 6 major unmet customer needs: affordable automation, intuitive UX, dashboards+reports in one tool, agency-specific workflows, SMB support tier, and reliability
Developed positioning framework with competitive messaging vs. each competitor (Supermetrics, Whatagraph, Looker, GDS, native)
Validated pricing assumption ($100/user/year = 10x cheaper than Supermetrics, positioning as 'affordable power')
Established clear differentiation: ReportEase is 3x cheaper than Whatagraph, 10x cheaper than Supermetrics, 100x cheaper than Looker
Created sales conversation scripts, email templates, landing page variants, and objection handling
Documented agency-first positioning as unique moat (no competitor claims this; all are enterprise or generic)
Recommended GTM roadmap: Phase 1 (beachhead messaging: time savings), Phase 2 (agency features), Phase 3 (expansion)

next_actions.label: Validate positioning with 10+ prospect interviews
next_actions.task_template: Send outreach to Apollo list with positioning test message

next_actions.label: Create landing page with validated positioning
next_actions.task_template: Build landing page variant emphasizing 'Reclaim 6 hours/week' and 'Supermetrics cost' messaging

next_actions.label: Develop case study from pilot customer
next_actions.task_template: Interview early adopter about time savings, cost savings, and competitive replacement

next_actions.label: Launch sales outreach using Supermetrics comparison
next_actions.task_template: Send cold email campaign emphasizing cost comparison and simplicity advantage
